name: the-russia-hoax
description: Gregg Jarrett's 'The Russia Hoax' — an investigative account arguing that the Trump-Russia collusion narrative was a politically motivated operation, covering the Steele Dossier, FISA warrants, and the Mueller investigation.
useCase: Understand the Trump-Russia investigation from the perspective that it was based on flawed intelligence, biased officials, and a media narrative that outran the facts.
knownRisks: Highly partisan topic — presents one side of a deeply contested narrative
Author is a Fox News commentator — not a neutral observer
Some claims are disputed by other investigations and journalists
